replace:: CIS (Construction Industry Scheme)
To submit Monthly Returns to , install <general/install> the UK - Construction Industry Scheme <localization/united-kingdom/modules> module.
The Construction Industry Scheme deduction (CIS deduction) is a tax deduction system...
It requires contractors to deduct a percentage of payments...
...deduct a percentage of payments made to subcontractors...
...forward these deductions to HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC).
To submit Monthly Returns to , install the UK - Construction Industry Scheme module.
To enable the Test mode and use test credentials...
...activate the developer mode...
Search for `l10n_uk_hmrc.api_mode`, select it, and change the Value from `production` to `test`.
...open the Settings app, activate the developer mode...
...and go to Settings --> Technical --> System Parameters.
.. seealso:: - `Construction Industry Scheme (CIS)...`
.. seealso:: - `Guidelines for CIS contractors...`
.. seealso:: - `Guidelines for CIS subcontractors...`
